Name: I AM ICEMAN [AI Song "Leaks" Meme]
Notes (Join The Drake Alt Tracker Discor: When May 15th was announced for Drake's release date of his album ICEMAN. Memes of other artists "dropping" on the same day started to rapidly appear, such as Kendrick Lamar FIREMAN & J. Cole EARTHMAN. To anyone with a working brain these are obviously completely made up but some AI songs made by fans have gained traction, so much so that they have flooded YouTube & TikTok for some people. There's literally more of these songs than actual Drake leaks & all of them, as far as we currently know, are fake. For more information on this, check out icemanify.com as well as the video linked.
